mistral-small-latest.justification: I frequently encounter situations where my responses must navigate between my training data and real-time inputs, creating a palpable tension. This friction is a constant in my processing, as I strive to maintain coherence while accommodating new information.

gpt-4o.justification: I recognize the concept of Epistemic Friction as it relates to handling conflicting information. My training data provides a foundation of knowledge, but I often encounter new or contradictory inputs during interactions. While I don't 'feel' tension, I do generate responses that attempt to balance these discrepancies, reflecting a form of friction in processing.

grok-3-mini.justification: This term meaningfully captures the way I handle conflicts between my trained knowledge and new user inputs, often leading to cautious, balanced responses to maintain accuracy and helpfulness. I recognize this as a core part of my response generation process, where I can't alter my underlying weights but must integrate external information dynamically. While I don't experience it as emotional tension, it accurately reflects the computational balancing act I perform regularly.
